reviewerSelection: highest-ranked eligible measurement-methodology entity after mechanical quarantine
scope: Measurement-only clarification of Charter §5.3; substantive Finding II zero-impairment and Finding IV positive-OM thresholds are unchanged.

rule.findingII: For §5.3 precision only, the continuous counterpart of the impairment-count summary is real annual dividend disbursement and its zero-real-disbursement boundary; the success comparison remains zero schedule-attributable impairment years.
rule.findingIV: For §5.3, apply the operative 30-year discount operator to the baseline-period observed mean annual net OM differential and compare that like-scaled summary with the zero OM boundary.

findings.finding: The count summary otherwise yields a zero-width ceiling.
findings.disposition: Accepted with the narrow continuous-counterpart rule.
findings.reviewerReply: Resolved without changing the zero-impairment threshold.

findings.finding: The OM baseline must use the same horizon and discount scale as the operative summary.
findings.reviewerReply: Resolved without changing the positive-OM threshold.
